title: bulk and scalar versions of mkey.rotate_xor_hash differ
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE z ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE w ( id INT, description TEXT, updated_at TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (id) REFERENCES z(id));
INSERT INTO z (name, created_at) VALUES ('Test Entry', '2023-10-01 12:00:00');
INSERT INTO w (id, description, updated_at) VALUES (1, 'This is a test description.', '2023-10-02 12:00:00');
INSERT INTO w (id, description, updated_at) SELECT id, description, updated_at FROM w WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: bulk and scalar inserts into primary key table
